task.summary: added swipe to delete functionality from database
added https instead of http in image Binding Adapter
changed serializable to parcelable implementation of data class
changed initialization of viewmodel in fragment
Set up action bar with nav controller
added extension function to show and hide progress bar
added extension function to show and hide progress bar
moved from Gson to Moshi Converter factory
offline caching with room, resource class updated for more precise errors

MESSAGE.value: added swipe to delete functionality from database
added https instead of http in image Binding Adapter
changed serializable to parcelable implementation of data class
changed initialization of viewmodel in fragment
Set up action bar with nav controller
added extension function to show and hide progress bar
